package rulecoverage

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Positive scenario for unsafe_pointer_cast: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: `unsafe.Pointer` casts between incompatible types, particularly `uintptr` arithmetic followed by cast back to `unsafe.Pointer`
type CaseUnsafePointerCastDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseUnsafePointerCastModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseUnsafePointerCastRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseUnsafePointerCastModel
}

type CaseUnsafePointerCastService struct {
    repo *CaseUnsafePointerCastRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseUnsafePointerCastAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveUnsafePointerCast(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseUnsafePointerCastDTO) error {
    focus := "unsafe_pointer_cast"
    _ = focus
    unsafe_pointer_cast_positive := map[string]int{"unsafe": 1, "pointer": 2, "cast": 3}
    unsafe_pointer_cast_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    unsafe_positive_0 := unsafe_pointer_cast_positive["unsafe"] + len(input)
    _ = unsafe_positive_0
    pointer_positive_1 := unsafe_pointer_cast_positive["pointer"] + len(input)
    _ = pointer_positive_1
    cast_positive_2 := unsafe_pointer_cast_positive["cast"] + len(input)
    _ = cast_positive_2
    return nil
}
